subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hello Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be happy to schedule a meeting to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

The following windows are available next week:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If you’d like, please propose a 30-minute time within one of those windows and we can take it from there.

As for direct internal contact details, I’m not able to share internal email addresses or phone numbers. Please use the contact information listed on our public website for any follow-up.

Best regards,
